title: Senior Software Engineer - FarmERP South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - FarmERP South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the FarmERP South Asia Partners family as a Senior Software Engineer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
